questions.question: Describe the concept of 'Design for Assembly and Disassembly' (DFAD) and its significance in reducing waste in the AEC industry. (10 marks)
Compare and contrast different types of recycling options available for electronic waste (e-waste) such as mechanical recycling, chemical recycling, and landfill disposal. (15 marks)
An architect is required to design a building that has a high recyclable material content. What are some strategies that the architect can use to achieve this? (5 marks)
